summary: Video. A Fox News broadcast segment from 'The Faulkner Focus' about DHS and ICE arresting 5,000 people in Los Angeles since June, described on screen as 'worst of the worst' criminal illegal aliens. It shows a network graphic reading 'WORST OF THE WORST ARRESTED' with mugshots and offense labels, arrest footage from Los Angeles, and a Washington Examiner op-ed quote card, all under Fox chyrons.
notable_text: FOX NEWS / THE FAULKNER FOCUS / WORST OF THE WORST ARRESTED / TOTAL 5,000 CRIMINAL ILLEGAL ALIENS ARRESTED IN LOS ANGELES SINCE JUNE / 'DHS AND ICE DESERVE PRAISE FOR ARRESTING 5,000 ILLEGAL MIGRANTS IN LOS ANGELES' (Washington Examiner)
